title: Gooey Poached Indian Millet Pilaf
description: This low-fat-friendly and brunch-mood dish features millet poached in a flavorful broth with vegetables for an indulgent yet healthy meal.

ingredients.name: 1 cup finely chopped green bell pepper

instructions: Combine millet and water or broth in a medium saucepan. Bring to a boil, then reduce heat to low, cover, and simmer until the liquid is absorbed (about 15-20 minutes).
While the millet simmers, heat oil in a small skillet over medium heat. Add cumin seeds and cook for about 30 seconds until fragrant.
Add onion, garlic, ginger, carrots, potatoes, and green bell pepper to the skillet with remaining ingredients. Stir-fry until vegetables are tender (about 5-7 minutes).
Gradually pour millet mixture into skillet with vegetables, stirring constantly. Reduce heat to low and let cook for an additional 10-12 minutes or until desired consistency is reached.
Serve hot garnished with fresh cilantro.
